title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at ACC Limited

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at ACC Limited
jsonLd.description:
ACC Limited is actively seeking a talented and motivated Production Engineer to join our dynamic team in Agra. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About ACC Limited:
ACC Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ACC Limited!
